suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document how mission workers should handle a repo that already has shared `.factory` changes before they start, including how to preserve those files, what clean-tree expectation applies to worker success, and when an isolated worktree or other scoped strategy should be used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-tui-child-env-sanitization` review noted that the worker had to deviate from procedure because unrelated `.factory` changes already existed in the repo, so the worker intentionally left them untouched and had no documented isolation workflow to follow.
